project.name: banana
project.summary: Experimental placeholder repository with no implementation or production surface declared yet.
goals: Provide a doctrine-compatible entry point for future experimental work.
Require concrete project goals, boundaries, public surfaces, validation, and delivery proof before production use.
nonGoals: Do not treat this placeholder as a production product.
Do not infer public APIs, deployment paths, billing behavior, or commercial commitments from the repository name alone.

forbiddenCouplings: Do not add behavior for a specific consumer repository.
